finding: Public and control-plane deployment packets can agree on an arbitrary origin unless the hostname is independently constrained to the configured Cloudflare Pages project or an explicit exact custom-domain allowlist.

accepted: explicit exact custom hostname allowlist entry
rejected: URLs with credentials or non-default ports
paths, queries, or fragments used as deployment identity

verification.claim_limit: No test passage, DNS resolution, HTTP reachability, Cloudflare account ownership, or deployment success is claimed.

falsification_route: Execute the test file in observed CI, then classify the deployment URL returned by Cloudflare control-plane metadata and reject reconciliation unless the classification is accepted and its normalized origin equals both retained proof packets.
privacy_boundary: Public repository configuration and abstract deployment evidence only; no credentials, health information, private chat, diagnosis, treatment, payment, or conversion data included.
